task_completion.description: Open the CAMEO Data Manager application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the record for 'Coastal Plains Chemical Storage'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The facility name 'Coastal Plains Chemical Storage' is visible in the active record view or search results within CAMEO Data Manager.

task_completion.description: Update the geographic coordinates with the correct Latitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '29.7523' is entered into the Latitude field of the facility record.

task_completion.description: Update the geographic coordinates with the correct Longitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '-95.3585' is entered into the Longitude field of the facility record.
Visual indication that the record has been saved, such as clicking a 'Save' button, a save confirmation message, or the record returning to a read-only view displaying the updated coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of CAMEO Data Manager rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager GUI being actively used (e.g., mouse clicks, active input fields) rather than a command prompt or PowerShell window executing SQL/scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual CAMEO Data Manager application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches CAMEO Data Manager, not a generic text editor, spreadsheet, or mock application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text file to bypass the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates and facility name are entered into the specific form fields of the CAMEO Data Manager software, not a Notepad or Word document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Facility: 'Coastal Plains Chemical Storage'. Expected Latitude: 29.7523. Expected Longitude: -95.3585. Database path: C:\CAMEOfm\Data\cameo.mdb.
